response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to scalable systems at Google and Meta, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation or growth platforms with metrics, feature flagging, or AI-driven decision systems — key requirements for the role. His AI-agent work at Google is promising but not clearly tied to growth systems, and his experimentation experience is implied rather than documented.
strengths: Proven experience at Google and Meta on scalable, high-throughput systems
Strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed infrastructure
Active open-source contributor with tools for testing, telemetry, and data collection
concerns: No clear track record designing experimentation frameworks or feature-flight systems
Lacks explicit mention of metrics, guardrails, or statistical analysis in growth contexts
AI experience is in agent infrastructure, not AI-augmented experimentation or measurement
